responses.content: C. Pursuing art for art's sake makes a person's life better.

questions.question: Which sentence from the text most strongly supports the correct answer to the previous question?

responses.content: D. “Practice any art, music, singing, dancing, acting, drawing, painting, sculpting, poetry, fiction, essays, reportage, no matter how well or badly, not to get money and fame, but to experience becoming, to find out what's inside you, to make your soul grow.”

She said to the officer, I shall not give up my seat for someone she had to go to court and would not giving a proceed she has fighting for the right and herself and the other students in the end of all these characters were fighting for their own others right it is important for me to know and fight for my rights to have free freedom.
responses.bucket_rationale: The paragraph contains several grammar and punctuation mistakes, such as missing punctuation marks, run-on sentences, and incorrect verb forms. These errors go beyond mere style or phrasing suggestions.
